description: BC side discrimination with a literal side (§9.2). Two dirichlet rules keyed on literal sides xmin/xmax over an xmax input. `side` is exposed as the `dim` match field; a literal `side` value must match by equality (`_match_sibling_name`), so the xmin rule is skipped and the xmax rule fires. Pins that `side` (not just bound as a pattern var, but matched literally) participates in matching.
